class BatchProcessor:
    def __init__(self):
        self.results = []

    def run(self, data):
        for item in data:
            self.results.append(transform(item))
        return self.results

class StreamProcessor:
    def process(self, data):
        for item in data:
            yield transform(item)

class DataValidator:
    def validate_all(self, data):
        return all(validate(item) for item in data)

class DataExporter:
    def export_json(self, data, filepath):
        with open(filepath, "w") as f:
            json.dump(data, f)

class DataImporter:
    def import_json(self, filepath):
        with open(filepath, "r") as f:
            return json.load(f)
